name: pcb-enclosure
description: Generate parametric enclosures (FDM-first) that fit tscircuit Circuit JSON boards: sizing, mounting standoffs, heat-set bosses, and feature cutouts.

scripts.build:stl: bun run scripts/render-board.tsx && bun run scripts/build.ts
scripts.check:examples: bun run build:examples && bun run scripts/check-examples.ts
scripts.dev: bun run scripts/prepare-local-runframe.ts && RUNFRAME_STANDALONE_FILE_PATH=../runframe/dist/standalone.local.min.js bun --hot ../cli/cli/main.ts dev examples/prefab-board.circuit.tsx
